demos.name: trust-boundary
demos.summary: Mapped trust boundaries between planner, executor, memory, and external API; demonstrated malicious API injection and containment.

demos.name: a2a
demos.summary: Demonstrated forged agent messages, message signing, and identity validation for agent-to-agent communication.

demos.name: capability
demos.summary: Applied allow/deny policies across actions, data, tools, and scope to block unsafe agent behaviour.

demos.name: attack-chain
demos.summary: Simulated a context-to-impact attack chain and then interrupted it with layered controls.

demos.name: runtime
demos.summary: Created a build/deploy/runtime protection view for a secure autonomous agent stack.
